headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 12, 2026**
article:
The Arizona Diamondbacks fell short in Philadelphia, while the Detroit Tigers secured a convincing 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins. The Pittsburgh Pirates edged out the Chicago Cubs in a close game, and the Minnesota Twins took down the Toronto Blue Jays 7-4.

Top MLB news saw the Diamondbacks drop a 3-4 decision to the Phillies, with Kyle Schwarber leading the Phillies' offense with a home run and three RBIs. The Tigers' Riley Greene led the charge at the plate with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs, while Casey Mize earned the win with 5.2 innings pitched, 5 strikeouts, and 1 earned run. The Pirates' Oneil Cruz led the offense with four hits, and Braxton Ashcraft impressed on the mound with five strikeouts and one earned run in five innings. The Twins' Trevor Larnach hit a home run and drove in three runs, while Joe Ryan pitched 7.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

Several players have been impacted by injuries and availability. Tyler O'Neill has been placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion, while Hunter Harvey has been placed on the 15-day injured list with right triceps inflammation. George Springer has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a left great toe fracture, and Adley Rutschman has been placed on the 10-day injured list with left ankle inflammation. Joe Boyle has been placed on the 15-day injured list with a right elbow strain, and Royce Lewis has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a left knee sprain.

Roster movement saw the Milwaukee Brewers trade RF Steward Berroa to the Philadelphia Phillies for cash. The St. Louis Cardinals traded LHP Nick Raquet to the Baltimore Orioles for 2B Brayden Smith, and traded RHP Patrick Galle to the St. Louis Cardinals. The San Francisco Giants traded 2B Tyler Fitzgerald to the Toronto Blue Jays for cash, and the Los Angeles Angels traded RHP Victor Mederos to the Atlanta Braves for future considerations.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Philly**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks dropped a 3-4 decision to the Philadelphia Phillies, with Kyle Schwarber leading the Phillies' offense with a home run and three RBIs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Marlins 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a convincing 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Riley Greene leading the charge at the plate. Greene's impressive performance included 2 hits, 1 home run, and 4 RBIs, while Casey Mize earned the win with 5.2 innings pitched, 5 strikeouts, and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Pirates Pull Off Thrilling 4-3 Win Over Cubs**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates edged out the Chicago Cubs in a close game, securing a 4-3 victory. Oneil Cruz led the Pirates' offense with four hits, while Braxton Ashcraft impressed on the mound with five strikeouts and one earned run in five innings.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 7-4**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured a 7-4 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Trevor Larnach leading the offense and Joe Ryan dominating on the mound. Larnach hit a home run and drove in three runs, while Ryan pitched 7.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **O'Neill Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right fielder Tyler O'Neill has been placed on the 7-day injured list due to a concussion. The move is retroactive to April 9, 2026.

top_news.title: **Brewers Make Roster Move Ahead of Friday's Game**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers traded RF Steward Berroa to the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash on April 8, 2026.
